exercises.title: Qubit State Simulator
exercises.description: Build a comprehensive qubit state simulator.
tasks: Implement Qubit class with Bloch sphere representation
Add measurement in different bases (Z, X, Y)
exercises.expectedOutput: Qubit simulator with measurement and visualization
hints: Use θ and φ for Bloch sphere coordinates
Use matplotlib for 3D Bloch sphere plotting

exercises.title: Quantum Channel Simulator
tasks: Implement depolarizing channel with Kraus operators
Implement amplitude damping for fiber loss
Calculate channel capacity vs error rate
exercises.expectedOutput: Multi-channel quantum simulator with capacity analysis
hints: Kraus operators satisfy Σ K†K = I

exercises.title: Quantum Teleportation Protocol
tasks: Generate Bell states for entanglement distribution
Apply Pauli corrections based on measurement
exercises.expectedOutput: Working teleportation protocol with noise analysis
hints: Bell measurement projects onto Bell basis
Four corrections: I, X, Z, XZ
Add amplitude damping to model realistic scenario

exercises.title: No-Cloning Theorem Demonstration
exercises.description: Demonstrate why quantum cloning is impossible.
tasks: Show cloning works for basis states
hints: CNOT clones |0⟩ and |1⟩ but not superpositions
Show U|ψ⟩|0⟩ = |ψ⟩|ψ⟩ fails for α|0⟩ + β|1⟩
